recent_form_summary: 9 straight wins at Queen's Club, won the 2024 title, now back in the final after missing 2025 with injury; beat Svajda, van de Zandschulp, Davidovich Fokina, and Humbert without dropping a set.
stat_trend_summary: Confirmed 15 aces in his R1 win over Svajda; 2026 season average is 7.06 aces/match with 22 combined aces across his first two matches this week.
opponent_factor_summary: Cerundolo is a quality but not elite grass returner (won only ~42.9% of break chances created this week); leads the grass H2H 2-1, which tempers the edge slightly.
injury_news: Withdrew from Stuttgart pre-tournament with a stiff neck but has fully recovered, no issues across 4 wins at Queen's.
notes: Strong underlying serve metrics (7.06 aces/match season average, 15 in one match, 22 combined across two rounds) support clearing 5.5, though full per-match granularity wasn't available for every match.
